description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) operating in autonomous mode was stopped at a stop sign on southbound Bryant Street at 18th Street in San 
Francisco. Just as the Zoox vehicle started to move, it was rear ended by an SUV (Vehicle 2), which failed to stop. The Zoox vehicle did not 
sustain any damage; however, its vehicle operator later reported neck and lower back injuries. The Zoox vehicle camera footage shows that 
the driver of Vehicle 2 was not looking ahead at the roadway before or at the time of contact. The police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
